title: ericoila flava
side_effects: Ericoila flava can have side effects if used improperly, such as nausea, dizziness, and headaches due to its toxic compounds. Ingesting large amounts of the plant can lead to more severe side effects, including vomiting, diarrhea, and abdominal pain. Prolonged use or misuse of the plant has also been linked to liver and kidney damage in some cases. It's essential to consult a medical professional before using any plant-based remedies to avoid these potential risks.
